cli.demo_help: Load floorplan.dxf demo with preset section and auto-generate preview
cli.project_help: Open a Kotline project file (.kesit) on startup
cli.ctk_required: CustomTkinter is required for the desktop app.
status.demo_loaded: Demo loaded: floorplan.dxf — section line, view point, and layer mapping preset.
status.section_line_set: Section line set — use View Point tool (step 4)
status.loaded_mm_override: Loaded {filename} — set units.source_override=cm (DXF header says mm)
status.complete_steps: Complete steps 3–4: section line (drag) and view point (1 click)
diag.section_changed: Section or view point changed. Click Generate Section to update preview.
diag.demo_units: Units: cm (source_override), wall height 280cm, section depth 500cm.
plan.hint.pan: Move: drag to reposition the plan
plan.hint.section: Section line: press and drag from start point (angle from P0)
plan.hint.view: Click one point on the viewing side
plan.section_too_short: Section line too short — drag farther from start point
plan.section_set: Section line set ({angle}° from P0) — now set view point
views.title: Views
views.help: Save section line + view point, then switch without redrawing.
views.empty:
No saved views yet.
Set section + view point, then Save.
views.enter_name: Enter a name for the view
views.set_before_save: Set section line and view point before saving a view
workflow.title: Kotline Workflow
workflow.step1.title: 1. Import
workflow.step1.desc: Load a DXF floor plan (Open DXF or Load Demo).
workflow.step2.title: 2. Layers
workflow.step2.desc: Map layer roles in the Layers tab (walls, openings, etc.).
workflow.step3.title: 3. Section Line
workflow.step3.desc: Use Section Line tool: press and drag on the plan; angle is shown from P0.
workflow.step4.title: 4. View Point
workflow.step4.desc: Use View Point tool: click once on the side you are viewing from.
workflow.step5.title: 5. Parameters
workflow.step5.desc: Set heights, units, and section depth in the Parameters tab.
workflow.step6.title: 6. Generate
workflow.step6.desc: Click Generate Section — preview updates when the section or view changes.
workflow.step7.title: Views
workflow.step7.desc: Save section + view point presets in the Views panel and switch between them.
diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
role.hint.walls: Cut: filled wall with hatch. Beyond section: vertical projection lines.
role.hint.openings: Generic opening void (dashed). Uses door height parameters.
role.hint.doors: Door opening at floor level (dashed rectangle, sill to door head).
role.hint.windows: Cut: dashed sill–head band. Projected: solid gray outline.
role.hint.columns: Cut: solid column profile with hatch. Projected: column outline.
role.hint.structure: Structural members as cut poché at storey height (column-like).
role.hint.fixtures: Projected outline (floor to waist height) behind the cut.
role.hint.footprint: Projected outline (floor to waist height) behind the cut.
error.missing_section: Project is missing DXF path or section definition
